block.title: Enterprise Threat Monitor App for Splunk - Configuration
block.text:
This section allows you to configure Enterprise Threat Monitor App for Splunk.

Step 1 - Download and Run ETM Agent for forwarding events to Splunk

For Splunk integration to work, ETM agent must be installed. After ETM agent is configured, it will connect to SAP, and pre-correlate and forward events to Splunk.

Please register and download Enterprise Threat Monitor agent from here. Upon registration you will receive an email with instructions.

Step 2 - Enter your API URL

Please enter your API URL, which is supplied to you by ESNC via email. (e.g. https://abc.enterprise-threat-monitor.com). Please leave blank and click save if you'd like to see sample data.
